platform.title: Select Target Platform
platform.prompt: Please select the reviewer's target platform:

ageRange.title: Select Age Range
ageRange.prompt: Please select the reviewer's age range:

interests.title: Select Interests
interests.prompt: Please select the reviewer's interests (multiple selection, reply with numbers like 1 3 5):

tone.title: Select Speaking Tone
tone.prompt: Please select the reviewer's speaking tone:

authorRelation.title: Select Author Relation
authorRelation.prompt: Please select the reviewer's relation to the author:

perspective.title: Select Perspective
perspective.prompt: Please select the reviewer's perspective (multiple selection, reply with numbers like 1 3):

options.traditional_culture: Focus on traditional cultural expression, local brands, and cultural identity
options.workplace_comm: Focus on workplace communication experience, expression methods, and practical scenarios
options.urban_female: Focus on wording details, emotional expression, and social issue sensitivities
options.rational_analyst: Focus on logical structure, information accuracy, and technical details
options.public_opinion: Easily influenced by public discussion atmosphere and comment section emotions
options.independent_thinker: Emphasizes individual expression, value consistency, and authentic feelings
options.commercial_observer: Focus on commercial expression, marketing language, and consumption authenticity
options.family_tradition: Focus on family values, intergenerational relations, and traditional value expression
options.community_core: Focus on community expression habits and atmosphere

dimensions.title: Select Review Dimensions
dimensions.prompt: Please select dimensions to review (defensive dimensions are mandatory):
dimensions.select: Please select offensive dimensions to review (reply with numbers to deselect, e.g., 1 3 to deselect #1 and #3):

name.title: Name the Reviewer
name.prompt: Please name the reviewer (leave empty for auto-generation):

confirm.title: Confirm Creation
confirm.prompt: Please confirm creating the following reviewer:

review.contentInput: Please enter the content to review:
review.selectReviewers: Please select re-review reviewers to use:

configure.confirmChanges: Please confirm the following configuration changes:

delete.selectPersona: Please select the reviewer to delete:
delete.confirmDelete: Please reply with full reviewer name to confirm deletion:
